# GumDirect

> UK supplier of Spray-Dried Acacia Senegal (E414) gum arabic for food, beverage, and industrial manufacturers. Sourced through established networks connected to production regions in Sudan.

GumDirect supplies a single, focused product — Spray-Dried Acacia Senegal (E414) — to manufacturers who need consistent quality, traceability, and reliable supply. We offer technical samples, technical data sheets (TDS), and provide COA and SDS documentation upon request.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of GumDirect and our Spray-Dried Acacia Senegal (E414) product.
- [Product: Acacia Senegal (E414)](/products/acacia-senegal): Specifications, functionality, and packaging for our spray-dried gum arabic.
- [Applications](/applications): Industries and use cases where Acacia Senegal is applied.
- [Beverages](/applications/beverages): Stabilisation, clouding, and emulsification in beverage formulation.
- [Emulsions](/applications/emulsions): Flavour and oil emulsion stabilisation.
- [Confectionery](/applications/confectionery): Texture, gloss, and binding in confectionery products.
- [Supplements](/applications/supplements): Encapsulation and carrier applications in nutritional supplements.
- [Pharmaceuticals](/applications/pharmaceuticals): Excipient and stabiliser uses in pharmaceutical formulations.
- [Bakery](/applications/bakery): Functional applications in bakery products.
- [Industrial](/applications/industrial): Non-food industrial applications of Acacia Senegal.
- [Order a Sample](/order-sample): Request a 1kg technical sample for evaluation.
- [Quality](/quality): Quality assurance, sourcing approach, and compliance information.
- [About](/about): Company background, approach, and supply model.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for quotes, technical questions, or documentation.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): UK GDPR privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms and conditions of use.
- [Cookies](/cookies): Cookie policy.
